regulation_name: Malaysian Code of Advertising Practice + MCMC Content Code (influencer disclosure)
citation: Malaysian Code of Advertising Practice — Rule 2 (Identification); MCMC Content Code Revamp 2021 — influencer marketing disclosures (#ad / #sponsored / Paid Partnership); brand vicarious liability for undisclosed paid content
summary: Advertorial and influencer/KOL sponsored social content must be clearly identified as paid advertising (#ad, #sponsored, Paid Partnership, or equivalent). Brands may bear vicarious liability for undisclosed paid partnerships.
review_guidance: TRIGGER: KOL posts, paid reviews, or branded editorial content marked as influencer/partnership. ACTION: INFO reminder — confirm disclosure labels before publish (copy review does not verify tags). CHECK: Platform ad tools, #ad / #sponsored / Paid Partnership, and Bahasa/English disclosure. ESCALATE IF: Undisclosed paid promotion presented as organic opinion.
